title: SweechBar no-vault empty state with onboarding copy
description: If a user opens SweechBar before running sweech init, they see two empty grids with no guidance.

context.text: Source (verbatim from 2026-05-16 audit): Audit Section 4: "SweechBar gets a no-vault empty state with onboarding copy"

acceptanceCriteria: If vaultAccounts.isEmpty AND accounts.isEmpty, show an onboarding view instead of empty grids
Copy points users at sweech init and sweech accounts import
Has a "Run sweech init…" button that opens Terminal with the command preloaded
